metadata.documentation: With Amazon Route 53 Profiles you can share Route 53 configurations with VPCs and AWS accounts

AssociateProfile.documentation: Associates a Route 53 Profiles profile with a VPC. A VPC can have only one Profile associated with it, but a Profile can be associated with up to 5000 VPCs.
